visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top with sheer puffy sleeves, stands in a brightly lit retail environment. She holds a white cake box with strawberries visible through its plastic window. The 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up of a refrigerated display case filled with various cakes. The camera zooms in on a white cake decorated with strawberries and another with colorful carrot-shaped frosting. (3) The woman points at a chocolate cake with pink and yellow floral frosting decorations. The background is filled with rows of industrial shelving and other bakery products. (4) The camera focuses on a cake with a grid pattern of carrot decorations, revealing a pre-divided design. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a supermarket setting. (5) The woman gives a thumbs up to the camera while smiling, standing in front of the display. Background shoppers and staff are visible in the blurred distance. (6) A final shot shows the woman holding a different cake box, appearing to be in the middle of a playful decision-making process.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 請問誰生日了嗎. (2) [Subtitle]: 有人生日嗎. [Subtitle]: 為什麼要買蛋糕. (3) [Subtitle]: 新的一年. [Subtitle]: 大家都是新生. (4) [Subtitle]: 為什麼不買這個蘿蔔田. [Subtitle]: 這蘿蔔田很可愛啊. (5) [Subtitle]: 也可以. [Subtitle]: 要哪一種. (6) [Subtitle]: 或者是等你50歲的時候. [Subtitle]: 送這個黑玫瑰. (7) [Subtitle]: 剛好這邊寫一個可. [Subtitle]: 可. [Subtitle]: 可以揍你嗎? [Subtitle]: 可. (8) [Variety]: 蛋糕隱藏設計. [Variety]: 原來是為了…. [Subtitle]: 啊這小朋友一人可以一塊啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 這個的用意是這樣. [Subtitle]: 好用心哦. (10) [Subtitle]: 這送給小朋友. [Subtitle]: 399更便宜. [Subtitle]: 換掉換掉. [Subtitle]: 換掉草莓.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character, 1 male hand/voice, and at least 1 background staff member.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black turtleneck with sheer, puffed sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, specifically the refrigerated bakery section with metal industrial shelving and various pre-packaged cakes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high energy and a cheerful tone in Mandarin. A percussive, upbeat electronic pop BGM begins with a steady 4/4 beat. (2) A male voice interjects with a teasing remark. The BGM remains constant, providing a bright, rhythmic foundation for the conversation. (3) Soft plastic rustling is heard as a cake box is handled. The voices are fast-paced, suggesting an excited discovery. (4) A short 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a specific realization in the speech. The male and female voices overlap in a natural, conversational manner while the music continues.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously review Costco's cake selection and highlight a clever 'hidden' design feature of a carrot-themed cake that makes it easy to share among many children.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent brand logo and specific showcase of store products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-engagement short-form video featuring social-media-native editing styles like rapid cuts and variety-show captions.
